input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.3.1.3
            TITLE: the brake system must have two independent hydraulic circuits

            CONTENT:
            rule T.3.1.3: The Brake System must have two independent hydraulic circuits
T.3.1.3 The Brake System must have two independent hydraulic circuits  
A leak or failure at any point in the Brake System must maintain effective brake power on 
minimum two wheels

final_answer: rule T.3.1.3: The Brake System must have two independent hydraulic circuits T.3.1.3 The Brake System must have two independent hydraulic circuits A leak or failure at any point in the Brake System must maintain effective brake power on minimum two wheels
